nasb.text: The rabble who were among them had greedy desires; and also the sons of Israel wept again and said, “Who will give us meat to eat?

esv.text: Now the rabble that was among them had a strong craving. And the people of Israel also wept again and said, “Oh that we had meat to eat!

cnv.text: 他們中間的閒雜人起了貪慾，甚至連以色列人也哭著說：“誰給我們肉吃呢？

ccb.text: 他们中间有一群乌合之众贪恋从前的食物，以色列人也哭着说：“要是有肉吃多好啊！
